description: Python application where yaml.load() only appears in a test file without an entry point. Production code uses yaml.safe_load(). CVE-2020-1747 is not exploitable in production.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: yaml.load() is only called in test_app.py which has no __main__ entry point. Production app.py uses yaml.safe_load() exclusively.

findings.human_justification: yaml.load() only exists in test_app.py which lacks a __main__ entry point. The production entry point in app.py only calls yaml.safe_load(), so the vulnerable function is unreachable from any entry point.
